name: interview_05

input.subject: Interview Confirmation - Senior Software Engineer Position
input.snippet: We're pleased to invite you for an interview...
input.body_text:
Dear Candidate,

Thank you for your interest in the Senior Software Engineer position at InnovateTech. We're pleased to invite you for an interview!

INTERVIEW DETAILS
-----------------
Date: Thursday, February 12, 2026
Time: 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM PST
Format: On-site interview

Location:
InnovateTech Headquarters
500 Innovation Drive, Building A
San Jose, CA 95110

Check in at the front desk and ask for Emily Rodriguez.

INTERVIEW SCHEDULE:
- 1:00 PM - Technical Interview (coding)
- 2:00 PM - System Design Discussion
- 2:45 PM - Team Fit / Q&A

What to Bring:
- Government-issued photo ID
- Portfolio or examples of work (optional)

Parking is available in the visitor lot.

Please confirm your attendance by replying to this email.

We look forward to meeting you!

Best regards,
Emily Rodriguez
Talent Acquisition
InnovateTech

events.title: Interview - InnovateTech Senior Software Engineer
events.location: InnovateTech Headquarters, 500 Innovation Drive, Building A, San Jose, CA 95110
events.description: On-site interview for Senior Software Engineer position

notes: Job interview with detailed schedule breakdown
